title: Create: Rackets
body:
## **_[**View The Latest Major "Reanimating And Addition" Update!**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-rackets/versions/)_**

![The title for "Create: Rackets"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df6a7254a82f3275928b7ddf8e9fb183a8c41d0f_0.webp)

The "Create" mod add-on which adds 3 new items!

**Brass, Copper, Diamond, Iron And Zinc Rackets!**

Either create them using a crafting table or automate it using Deployers! With more coming soon with diffrent materials!

<details>
<summary>Slapping And Stinging Title update</summary>

![Slapping And Stinging Title Card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/420fefe68708734904f32ba285f4a93ac71b8174.png)

## The First Major Update!

Adds Diamond Racket and Sting enchantment which does damage over time!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Reanimating And Addition update</summary>

![Reanimating And Addition Title Card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/410a3322acd59a5bde5d5d16d23830f159de7806.png)

## The Second Major Update!
Adds Iron Racket and Reanimate enchantment which summons a Enchanted Racket which teleports players into random areas and apply "Sting" and "Glowing" effects!

Added all new "Scroll" item which adds a random enchant onto your item and a way to recycle your rackets!

</details>
